items.title: [Google Play 差评] ★1 If you really want to launch to GB serve
items.summary: If you really want to launch to GB server, at least, pls hire some translater to translate from CN to En. Use chatGPT to servíce your non CN speaker customer is very ridiculous and pathetic. Yes, we can read it, but it's hard to understand context in the story.
items.author: Muckkaphon Phanurassame

items.summary: Ich werde sicherlich nicht für Stunden das Handy zur Seite legen zum Downloaden von unter 5GB Content...
items.author: Ali Karadas
